name: Ld's Homade Mayonnaise
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, combine the eggs, vinegar, and mustard.
2. Gradually add the seasoning salt while blending.
3. Slowly pour in the vegetable oil while the blender continues running.
4. Continue stirring until all ingredients are well combined.
5. The mixture will make approximately 1 pint.
